name: Mousakas Patates Ke Kima (Moussaka Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pounds Tomatoes, peeled and strained OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and peel potatoes. Cut into thin slices and fry in butter.
2. Brown chopped meat and onions in 3 tablespoons of butter, stirring to break up the meat.
3. Add tomatoes (or paste with water), salt, pepper, and parsley. Cover, and simmer until all the liquids have been absorbed.
4. Remove from the heat. Stir in one-third of the cheese and 3 to 4 tablespoons of bread crumbs.
5. Butter a baking pan; sprinkle with bread crumbs.
6. Spread half the potatoes into the pan and sprinkle with cheese.
7. Spread the chopped meat evenly over it.
8. Layer the remaining potatoes on top and sprinkle with more cheese.
9. Cover with bechamel sauce, sprinkle with the rest of the cheese, and then with bread crumbs.
10. Drizzle melted butter on top.
11. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 30 to 40 minutes, or until golden.
